headline: Atos Unveils its Threat Research Center
summary: Press Release Atos Unveils its Threat Research Center A next-gen hub for advanced threat intelligence, purpose built to fortify proactive defense and elevate cyber resilience against emerging adversaries Paris, France – March 31, 2026 – Atos, a global leader of AI-powered digital transformation, today announces the official launch of its Threat Research Center (TRC) - a next generation intelligence hub designed to deliver earlier, deeper, and more actionable insights into the world’s rapidly evo
